results.rendered_html: vṛthā—māṃsa n. ‘flesh taken at random’ or ‘useless flesh’ (i.e. flesh not destined for the gods or Pitṛs but for one's own use only; the eater of such flesh is said to be born as a demon),  ŚBr. ;  Mn. ;  Gaut.  &c.

example.ru: мясо, не принесенное в жертву богам
